title: 朝日杯FSの後に・イントロダクション

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Biwa Hayahide and I head to the
training course to apply the data she's collected
today into her calculations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the track, we find Winning Ticket and Narita
Taishin training, apparently having been inspired
by the race to work even harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching them run their hearts out makes Biwa
Hayahide realize it's only a matter of time before
she must face them at the starting line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More importantly though, she must set herself
apart to compete against her sister. And to
achieve that, we make our next goal the first race
in the Classic Triple Crown tour, the Satsuki Sho.
